name: Join Game
desc: Welcomes the player into the world. Sends entity ID, gamemode, dimension, difficulty, max players, world type, and reduced debug info.

fields.name: maxPlayers
fields.desc: Max players (used to draw player list)

fields.name: reducedDebugInfo
fields.desc: Whether to hide coordinates in F3 debug screen

implementation.overview: Sent on world join. Carries entityId, gamemode, dimension, difficulty, maxPlayers, worldType, reducedDebugInfo. Modules: SessionInfo (capture data), AutoRegister (trigger on join), NameProtect.

modules.name: SessionInfo
modules.purpose: Read join data for module init.
modules.detailed_code: if (event.getPacket() instanceof S01PacketJoinGame) { this.entityId = s01.getEntityId(); this.gamemode = s01.getGameType(); }
